nodes.context: Chinese American street gang in New York City's Chinatown, active 1967-1994, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, murder.
Chinese secret society/tong affiliated with the Flying Dragons.
Rival Chinese American street gang in New York City's Chinatown during the 1980s.
Italian-American organized crime groups that lost heroin trade after Pizza Connection prosecutions.
Former branch of the Flying Dragons consisting of primarily Vietnamese members.
Vietnamese gang formed by former Vietnamese Flying Dragons member David Thai, rival to Flying Dragons and Ghost Shadows.

edges.context: Flying Dragons were affiliated with the Hip Sing Tong.
Flying Dragons engaged in bloody turf wars with Ghost Shadows during the 1980s.
Flying Dragons moved into heroin trafficking after Italian-American Mafia lost the trade due to Pizza Connection prosecutions.
Vietnamese Flying Dragons were a former branch of the Flying Dragons gang.
Born to Kill, formed by ex-Vietnamese Flying Dragons member David Thai, competed with Flying Dragons for control of Chinatown.
Born to Kill competed with Ghost Shadows for control of Chinatown.
